mapper.select: select id, vendor_name, vendor_url, vendor_description, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from vendor_information where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select id, vendor_name, vendor_url, vendor_description, (select count(1) from vendor_account_information where vendor_id = vendor_information.id and is_deleted = 0) as account_count from vendor_information
1 = 1 and is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from vendor_account_information where vendor_id = #{vendorId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into vendor_information(id, vendor_name, vendor_url, vendor_description, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{vendorName}, #{vendorUrl}, #{vendorDescription}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into vendor_information(id,vendor_name, vendor_url, vendor_description, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.vendorName}, #{entity.vendorUrl}, #{entity.vendorDescription}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into vendor_information(id,vendor_name, vendor_url, vendor_description, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.vendorName}, #{entity.vendorUrl}, #{entity.vendorDescription}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update vendor_name = values(vendor_name), vendor_url = values(vendor_url), vendor_description = values(vendor_description), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
